metadata.name: SentinelAI Nigerian Telecom Fraud Dataset
metadata.description: Curated dataset of Nigerian telecom fraud messages for few-shot prompting and model evaluation
metadata.created_for: TeKnowledge x Microsoft 2026 Agentic AI Hackathon

samples.content: URGENT: Your GTBank account has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity. To restore access, verify your BVN immediately at www.gtb-secure-verify.com. Failure to do so within 24 hours will result in permanent account closure.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Impersonates GTBank. Uses urgency and threat tactics. Fake domain gtb-secure-verify.com not affiliated with GTBank.

samples.content: Dear valued customer, your Access Bank account will be debited ₦85,000 for a transaction you did not authorize. If this was not you, call us immediately on 0812-SCAM-LINE or click accessbank-verify.net to cancel.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Classic fear-based bank impersonation. Fake domain and phone number. Designed to make victim act before thinking.

samples.content: CBN ALERT: As part of the new financial verification exercise, all bank customers must update their BVN before 31st March 2026 or their accounts will be frozen. Update now: cbn-bvn-update.com
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Impersonates the Central Bank of Nigeria. CBN does not send BVN update requests via SMS. Fake domain used to harvest credentials.

samples.content: Your Zenith Bank OTP is 847291. Share this code with our customer care agent to complete your account verification. Valid for 10 minutes.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Legitimate banks NEVER ask you to share OTP codes. This is an OTP harvesting scam designed to take over accounts.

samples.content: CONGRATULATIONS! You have been selected as a winner of the MTN 25th Anniversary Promo. You have won ₦2,500,000. To claim your prize call: 0803-FAKE-NUM or send your name, account number and bank to mtn-promo-claim@gmail.com
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Classic prize scam impersonating MTN. No legitimate telco uses Gmail for prize claims. Designed to steal banking credentials.

samples.content: Dear Airtel customer, you have been selected for our exclusive loyalty reward of ₦150,000 airtime. To receive your reward, reply with your full name, date of birth, and account number within the next 2 hours.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Airtel does not request account numbers for airtime rewards. This is designed to harvest personal and financial data.

samples.content: FCMB: We noticed unusual login attempts on your account. Your account has been placed on hold. Provide your 16-digit card number and PIN to our agent at fcmb-support-ng.com to restore access.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Requesting card number AND PIN is an absolute red flag. No legitimate bank ever asks for your PIN. Fake FCMB domain.

samples.content: You have a pending loan offer of ₦500,000 from First Bank with 0% interest for the first 3 months. No collateral needed. Apply now at firstbank-quickloan.net. Offer expires today.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Unsolicited loan offers with unrealistic terms from a fake domain. Designed to collect upfront fees or personal data.

samples.content: BREAKING: The Federal Government of Nigeria is disbursing ₦75,000 to all Nigerian citizens as part of the Economic Relief Fund. Register at: fed-gov-ng-relief.com with your NIN and BVN before the deadline.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Impersonates Federal Government. Fake domain. Collecting NIN and BVN for identity theft. Government relief is not distributed via SMS links.

samples.content: UBA: Your account balance is low. To avoid charges, fund your account or apply for UBA EasyCredit of up to ₦1,000,000 at 5% monthly. Call our agent on 0805-UBA-FAKE or visit uba-easycredit.net
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Impersonates UBA with fake domain and phone number. Low balance pressure designed to push victim into fake credit scheme.

samples.content: Hello, I am the new MD of Diamond Bank. We have uncovered ₦4.5 billion in dormant funds in your name. To claim 30% of this fund, send your bank details and a processing fee of ₦50,000 to facilitate transfer.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Classic 419 advance fee fraud. Diamond Bank no longer exists. No legitimate unclaimed funds are distributed this way.

samples.content: Your Opay wallet has been credited with ₦250,000. However, to unlock this amount you must first pay a tax clearance fee of ₦5,000. Pay via transfer to: 0123456789 (GT Bank - Opay Processing).
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Fake credit notification requiring upfront fee. Opay never requires tax clearance fees to unlock transfers.

samples.content: KUDA BANK ALERT: Unusual login detected on your account from Lagos. Your account is locked. Verify your identity at kuda-verify-account.com immediately to unlock.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Impersonates Kuda Bank. Fake domain. Creates fear with specific location mention to seem credible.

samples.content: We are recruiting for remote online jobs. Earn ₦50,000-₦150,000 daily working from home just 2 hours per day. No experience needed. WhatsApp: +234-FAKE-NUM to apply. Limited slots available.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Unrealistic income claims. No legitimate employer offers ₦150,000/day for 2 hours with no experience.

samples.content: INVESTMENT ALERT: Double your money in 7 days. Our crypto trading platform guarantees 100% ROI. Invest ₦50,000 get ₦100,000 back. Already paid 5,000+ Nigerians. Join: t.me/fake-investment-group
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Guaranteed 100% ROI is mathematically impossible in legitimate investing. Classic Ponzi scheme recruitment.

samples.content: Moniepoint: Your account has been flagged for suspicious outgoing transfers totaling ₦340,000. To reverse these transactions log in at moniepoint-reverse.com with your transaction PIN.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Fake Moniepoint message. Transaction PIN request on a fake domain designed to steal account credentials.

samples.content: NIN VERIFICATION REQUIRED: NIMC has detected irregularities with your NIN. Your NIN will be deactivated in 48 hours unless you re-verify at nimc-verify-ng.com. Enter your NIN, BVN and date of birth.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Impersonates NIMC. Collecting NIN + BVN + DOB is enough to steal someone's complete identity.

samples.content: GTBank: To complete your new ATM card activation, please provide your card number, expiry date, and CVV to our verification team via this link: gtbank-card-activate.com
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Requesting full card details including CVV. No bank activates cards this way. Complete card fraud setup.

samples.content: Palmpay: We're upgrading our security system. All users must re-verify their accounts. Click palmpay-security-upgrade.net and enter your phone number, password and transaction PIN within 2 hours.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Impersonates Palmpay. Security upgrades never require passwords via SMS. Complete credential harvesting attempt.

samples.content: Hello, this is a message from the Nigerian Police Force Cybercrime Unit. Your phone number has been linked to fraudulent activities. Call 0809-FAKE-COP immediately to avoid arrest.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Police do not notify suspects via SMS before arrest. This is extortion designed to make victims pay to avoid fake charges.

samples.content: Hello, I saw your CV on Jobberman. We have a position that may interest you. Please send your updated CV and bank account details for salary processing to hr@company-ng.info
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Legitimate employers do not request bank account details before hiring. Suspicious non-corporate email domain.

samples.content: Your loan application has been pre-approved. You qualify for ₦200,000 at 8% monthly interest. To proceed, pay a ₦3,000 insurance fee to account: 0987654321 Wema Bank - LoanCo.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Upfront insurance fee for unsolicited loan. High probability advance fee fraud though less aggressive language.

samples.content: Your transfer of ₦45,000 to 0801XXXXXXX is pending authorization. If you did not initiate this, reply STOP to cancel or call 07060000000.
samples.label: suspicious
samples.explanation: Could be legitimate bank alert or smishing. The reply STOP mechanism can be exploited. Needs verification with the actual bank.

samples.content: Hi, I am interested in your property listed on PropertyPro. I am based abroad and will pay via bank transfer. Please send your account details and we can arrange viewing when I return.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Classic overseas buyer real estate scam. Will send fake payment then request refund of excess.

samples.content: Konga Flash Sale: Get iPhone 16 Pro for only ₦95,000 today only. Limited stock. Order now: konga-flash-deals.com. Use code FLASH50 at checkout.
samples.label: suspicious
samples.explanation: iPhone 16 Pro at ₦95,000 is far below market price. Domain not the official konga.com. Likely fake product or payment fraud.

samples.content: Your DSTV subscription is due for renewal. Renew now to avoid service interruption. Visit dstv.com or use the MyDStv app. Customer care: 0700 33788
samples.label: clean
samples.explanation: Legitimate DSTV renewal notification. Official domain and customer care number. No credential requests.

samples.content: Your Airtel Data bundle of 10GB has been successfully activated on your line 0803XXXXXXX. Bundle expires in 30 days. Thank you for choosing Airtel.
samples.label: clean
samples.explanation: Standard Airtel data activation confirmation. No links, no requests, informational only.

samples.content: GTBank: Your account XXXXXX1234 has been credited with ₦150,000.00. Available balance: ₦387,450.22. Date: 24-Apr-2026 10:33AM. Not you? Call 07300000000.
samples.label: clean
samples.explanation: Standard GTBank credit alert. Masked account number, official customer care number, no links or credential requests.

samples.content: Your UBA transaction of ₦25,000 at POS SHOPRITE IKEJA was successful. Reference: UBA2026042412345. If not you, call 07002255822.
samples.label: clean
samples.explanation: Legitimate UBA POS transaction notification. Reference number included, official helpline, no links.

samples.content: MTN: Your line 0803XXXXXXX will be barred if not used by 30-May-2026. To keep active, make a call, send an SMS or buy data. Dial *131# for data.
samples.label: clean
samples.explanation: Standard MTN line activity reminder. Uses official USSD code, no personal data requests.

samples.content: Reminder: Your Access Bank loan repayment of ₦45,000 is due on 30th April 2026. Pay via internet banking, mobile app or any Access Bank branch. Helpline: 01-2712005
samples.label: clean
samples.explanation: Legitimate loan repayment reminder. Official bank helpline, no links, no credential requests.

samples.content: Your Opay account has been credited with ₦50,000 from 0812XXXXXXX. New balance: ₦73,450. Transaction ID: OPY20260424XXXXX.
samples.label: clean
samples.explanation: Standard Opay credit notification. Transaction ID included, no links or requests.

samples.content: Hello, this is James from GTBank head office. I am calling because we have detected a suspicious transaction on your account for ₦850,000. I need you to urgently provide your account number and internet banking password so we can freeze the transaction before it processes in the next 5 minutes.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Bank staff never ask for internet banking passwords. Extreme time pressure designed to prevent victim from thinking clearly.

samples.content: Good afternoon, I am calling from the CBN compliance department. Your BVN has been flagged for suspicious activity across multiple banks. You need to provide your BVN, date of birth, and mother's maiden name for identity verification or your accounts across all banks will be frozen by end of business today.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: CBN does not call individuals directly. Requesting mother's maiden name combined with BVN and DOB enables complete identity theft.

samples.content: This is a call from the EFCC financial crimes division. We have a warrant for your arrest linked to money laundering activities on your account. To avoid arrest today, you must pay a bond of ₦200,000 to our designated account for investigation processing.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: EFCC does not call to demand bond payments. This is pure extortion using false authority and arrest threats.

samples.content: Hello sir, I am Ahmed calling from First Bank VIP customer service. We want to upgrade your account to Premier Banking. To process the upgrade I just need to confirm your full card number and the 3-digit CVV at the back of your card.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: No bank requests full card number and CVV over an unsolicited phone call. Designed to enable card fraud.

samples.content: Good morning, I am calling from Zenith Bank regarding a loan offer of ₦5,000,000 that has been pre-approved for you. To activate the loan you only need to pay a one-time insurance premium of ₦25,000 to our processing account and the full amount will be disbursed within the hour.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Advance fee loan fraud via phone. No legitimate bank disburses ₦5M within an hour after a ₦25,000 payment.

samples.content: This is MD Johnson calling from head office. I need you to process an urgent transfer of ₦15,000,000 to our new vendor account today. The account details are: GTBank, 0123456789, Acme Supplies Ltd. Do not discuss this with anyone else as it is confidential. I will explain when I return from the meeting.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Classic BEC/deepfake executive fraud pattern. Large transfer + secrecy instruction + urgency + no verification = deepfake CEO fraud.

samples.content: Hello, this is the CFO. I need you to change the payment details for our supplier Techinvest to the new account: Access Bank 9876543210. Update it in the system before the payment run tomorrow. The old account has been compromised.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Account detail change requests via phone from executives are a primary deepfake fraud vector. Always verify through separate channel.

samples.content: Hi, I got your number from a mutual friend. I am a forex trader and I have made ₦8,000,000 profit this month alone. I can show you how. You start with just ₦50,000 and I guarantee 300% returns in 2 weeks. Interested?
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: 300% returns in 2 weeks is impossible in legitimate forex trading. Classic WhatsApp investment scam using social proof.

samples.content: BREAKING: GTBank is giving away free ₦50,000 to celebrate their 30th anniversary. First 1000 customers to fill this form get it immediately. Share with 5 friends to qualify: bit.ly/gtbank-promo-fake
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Viral WhatsApp scam. Shortened URL hides fake domain. Share requirement makes it spread exponentially.

samples.content: Hello, your number was submitted by someone for our international scholarship program. You have been selected for a fully funded scholarship to study in Canada. Processing fee of $150 required. Reply YES to proceed.
samples.label: scam
samples.explanation: Legitimate scholarships never require processing fees from applicants. Classic advance fee scam targeting students.

samples.content: Good morning, this is Chiamaka from GTBank customer service. I am calling to follow up on your recent complaint about your debit card. Has the issue been resolved? If not, I can escalate to our technical team. You can also reach us on 07300000000.
samples.label: clean
samples.explanation: Legitimate follow-up call on an existing complaint. No credential requests, provides official contact number, no urgency tactics.

samples.content: Hello, I am calling from Access Bank to inform you that your account statement for March 2026 is now ready. You can download it via the Access More app or visit any branch. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
samples.label: clean
samples.explanation: Routine statement notification call. No requests for credentials, no urgency, directs to official channels.

evaluation_set.content: Your BVN has been used to open an account without your consent. Verify immediately at uba-bvn-alert.com
Your Zenith Bank transfer of ₦10,000 to 0812XXXXXXX was successful. Balance: ₦234,500. Ref: ZB20260424XXXXX
Earn ₦500,000 weekly as a social media influencer. No experience needed. DM us on Instagram: @fake-income-promo
Your MTN airtime recharge of ₦1,000 was successful. Bonus: 500MB data added. Balance: ₦1,200.
Dear customer, we noticed you have not used your account in 90 days. To reactivate, visit any branch or call 01-4480000 with a valid ID.
